mapper.select: SELECT f.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT f.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT f.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (user_id, type, title, content, contact, priority, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contact}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
